title: TwilightLuckyBlock
description:
[DISCONTINUED]
(TWILIGHT FOREST MOD IS REQUIRED!)
MyLuckyBlock addon for twilight forest mod.
body:
# [TWILIGHT FOREST](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) MOD IS REQUIRED!

# Summary
An Addon for [MyLuckyBlock](https://modrinth.com/mod/myluckyblock).
![img1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Oa8l2Lra/images/fad3a3ef62efe3cfec632e00c611fc5715c8d517.png)

# Worldgen
Added a new lucky block named "Twilight Lucky Block", it will gen in twilight forest.
![img2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Oa8l2Lra/images/55a7ec770214bd7785db49466dbb8512fd7e908d.png)

# Recipes
![img3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Oa8l2Lra/images/be58848be7b3aff640abb0087d992b80251e4104.png)
![img4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Oa8l2Lra/images/418a0d393f9ed0939929af9c4bef023df4a1f237.png)

# New Events
Also,there's some new events.
![img5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Oa8l2Lra/images/235d962c5ecb16562f03af4af05c20dc958175f9.png)
